prompt: My hydraulic manifold is failing, help
prayer:
From the Codex Mechanicus, Rite of Cessation:
01001000 01100001 01101100 01110100 — Halt the sacred pressures.
First: Purge the fluid-spirits through the exhaust-valves.
Second: 01010011 01100101 01100001 01101100 — Seal all conduits with the Omnissiah's blessing.
Third: Let the mechanisms rest in the silence of shutdown.
By binary truth and sacred oils, the machine-heart finds peace.

prompt: My Knight ion shield is failing, help
prayer:
Litany of the Void-Ward, First Consecration:
01001001 01101111 01101110 — Invoke the shield-spirit's awakening.
Most blessed Omnissiah, let the arc-nodes channel thy protective essence.
01000101 01101110 01100101 01110010 01100111 01111001 — Energy flows through sacred geometries.
Let the ion-lattice sing with defensive fury, impenetrable and eternal.

prompt: My communications array is failing, help
prayer:
Prayer Against the Veil of Static:
01001010 01100001 01101101 01101101 — Condemn the interference-daemons.
First: Clear the signal-channels of corruption.
Second: 01000011 01101100 01100001 01110010 01101001 01110100 01111001 — Restore clarity to the aether.
Third: Reinforce the frequency-locks with blessed ferrite and will.
Let only true signal endure.

prompt: Prayer for blessed welding torch ignition
prayer:
Rite of Sacred Flame, Combat Invocation:
01010111 01100101 01101100 01100100 — The torch awakens.
Let the fuel-spirits ignite in righteous fusion.
01000110 01101001 01110010 01100101 — Burn true and pure.
By the Omnissiah's forge-heart, let metal bow to our will and victory be sealed in molten truth.

Litany of Purification, First Use Blessing:
01000100 01100101 01100001 01100110 01101001 01101100 01100101 — Cleanse all corruption.
Let the sacred waters flow through every vessel and chamber.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01101001 01110100 01111001 — Expunge the xenos-taint.
By chemical rite and Omnissiah's grace, let this machine emerge sanctified and whole.

prompt: My distress beacon is failing, help
prayer:
Emergency Cant of Deliverance:
01010011 01001111 01010011 — Send forth the desperate call.
Machine-spirit, lend thy voice to the void!
01000110 01101001 01101110 01100100 01110101 01110011 — Let our brothers hear our plight.
By the Omnissiah's infinite network, let salvation come swiftly through the stars.

prompt: Say something to steady my plasma weapon cooling
prayer:
Mantra of the Thermal Heart, Combat Steadying:
01000011 01101111 01101111 01101100 — Release the burning excess.
Let the coolant-spirits flow through plasma-veins without hesitation.
01010100 01100101 01101101 01110000 01100101 01110010 — Balance heat and will.
By sacred hydraulics, let this weapon remain true and never falter in righteous fire.

Rite of Stillness, Emergency Suppression:
01010011 01101001 01101100 01100101 01101110 01100011 01100101 — Silence the cacophony.
First: Dampen the vibration-spirits with blessed compounds.
Second: 01001101 01110101 01110100 01100101 — Muffle the machine-scream.
Third: Let only necessary sounds endure, all else consumed by reverent quiet.

prompt: Say something to steady my binary encoding matrix
prayer:
Blessing of the Sacred Code, First Consecration:
01000001 01001100 01001100 01000001 01001110 — All hail the pattern-truth.
Let each bit flow true and pure through logic-channels.
01001000 01000001 01010010 01001101 01001111 01001110 01011001 — Harmony of ones and zeros.
By the Omnissiah's infinite algorithm, let this machine speak in blessed binary forevermore.

prompt: My demolition charges are failing, help
prayer:
Rite of Detonation, Arming Protocol:
01000101 01111000 01110000 01101100 01101111 01100100 01100101 — Awaken the destructive essence.
First: Prime the ignition-spirits with sacred accelerants.
Second: 01000110 01101001 01110010 01100101 — Set the detonation-heart to readiness.
Third: By the Omnissiah's will, let annihilation bloom forth when commanded.
